title: VisionVault Performance Benchmarks & KPIs

performance_metrics.max_concurrent_streams: 12 streams (1080p, 30 FPS on a single Nvidia RTX 4090)
performance_metrics.database_query_latency: 12ms (average search return time for semantic querying over 100k keyframes)

operational_impact: Reduced storage footprints by 70% due to dynamic delta-frame caching compared to 24/7 raw video archiving.
Automated alerts are triggered within 500ms of anomaly detection (e.g., restricted area entrance).
